news.t: This hedge-fund-style ETF is aimed at investors looking to diversify in volatile markets. Here's what to look for.
BlackRock Simplifies Investor Access to Liquid Alternatives with Managed Futures ETF

overview.description: The iShares Managed Futures Active ETF (ISMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks to deliver differentiated returns from traditional stocks and bonds by investing long and short in futures contracts and futures-related instruments across global markets and asset classes. ISMF was launched on Mar 12, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: This hedge-fund-style ETF is aimed at investors looking to diversify in volatile markets. Here's what to look for.
data.text: Markets have been volatile this year, with some investors turning to alternative strategies for diversification as those increasingly become available to the masses.

data.title: BlackRock Simplifies Investor Access to Liquid Alternatives with Managed Futures ETF
